name: Peanut Cluster Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Melted semisweet chocolate or milk chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. Stir together the sifted flour and baking powder.
4. Add this mixture to the creamed mixture alternately with milk, beginning and ending with flour.
5. Add the peanuts with the last addition of flour.
6. Drop by tablespoons onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 18 to 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Dip into melted chocolate.
9. Chill before serving.
